title: Decent Biomes
description: Mod enhancing Minecraft world with few new biomes including autumnal biomes, luminiscent biome and more.This mod also adds coconut palm tree and apple tree with functional fruits.
body:
![Decent Biomes](https://i.imgur.com/aqBu9At.png)

## TerraBlender recommended  
## Requires Fabric API for Fabric versions
## ALPHA

---
A mod enhancing the Minecraft world with a few new biomes, including:

- **Autumnal biomes**  
- **Enhanced Cherry Grove biome** *(inspired by the Trails and Tales update, adapted for earlier versions)*  
- **Luminescent biome**  
- **Plant-based decorations** and more  

The enhanced Cherry Grove also includes corresponding building blocks and **cherries**.

This mod also adds **coconut palm trees** and **apple trees** with functional fruits and a few food items.

## Guide

- 🍎 Harvest fruits with **right-click**  
- 🍒 Cherries occasionally drop from enhanced cherry leaves  
- 🌴 Coconut palms can be found on beaches  
- 🌳 Apple tree saplings, palm saplings, autumnal saplings, and harvestable cherry saplings can be crafted; others are obtained through harvesting  
- 🌿 Vines can be grown with bonemeal to any desired length without placement restrictions  
- ✨ The luminescent biome tends to spawn alongside warm biomes such as savannas and badlands  

More information, performance tips, and all recipes are available here:  
**[Decent Biomes Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1axU0a9bnuPWEeSuIcWWaCtB8aL9ogAjE/view?usp=sharing)**

## Notes

*This mod blends well with most other biome mods (such as Biomes O' Plenty), but compatibility is not guaranteed. Please make backups.*

## Preview

![Biome Examples](https://i.imgur.com/T0wjQ8s.png)

*Mod content examples*

### Please do not distribute this mod, re-uploading this to other websites is **not permitted**.
You may include this mod in modpacks or videos with proper credit.
